texto: The response closest to the truth was probably something like 'Nothing'
autor: but it's always difficult to explain that kind of thing to an active person.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a but it's always difficult to explain that kind of thing to an active person.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The response closest to the truth was probably something like 'Nothing'” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, michel-houellebecq, response pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
